meta.ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances
meta.project_subject: Setting up of PMU for CPGRAMS with 3 resource persons for a period of six months-extending of project-reg.
meta.deliverables: Quality analysis of Grievances (On Monthly Basis), Preparation of monthly reports, Data analysis, Any Other work as assigned from time to time. Payment milestones: 20% on Award of Work-Order and Commencement of Work, 20% on Finalization of CPGRAMS - Monthly report format & submission of first 2 Reports, 20% on Submission of CPGRAMS -Monthly Reports (2nd lot of next 2 Reports), 40% on Submission of CPGRAMS -Monthly Reports (3rd lot of next 2 Reports).

content.full_text: The Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances under the Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions has issued an ex post facto approval extending the Work Order for setting up a Project Management Unit (PMU) of the Quality Council of India (QCI) for CPGRAMS. The project involves 3 resource persons for a six-month period from 18-07-2023 to 17-01-2024 at a cost of Rs.32,76,000/- (excluding admissible taxes). The deliverables include monthly quality analysis of grievances, preparation of monthly reports, data analysis, and any other assigned work. Payment is structured in four milestones: 20% on award and commencement, 20% on finalization of report format and submission of first 2 reports, 20% on submission of next 2 reports, and 40% on submission of final 2 reports.
